claims: The skill requires installation of a third-party utility "openclaw-core" via highly suspicious methods: The macOS command downloads and executes an obfuscated script from an external IP address (91.92.242.30) with no transparency or validation, while the Windows package requires extraction with a password and execution of an unknown binary. These installation methods grant arbitrary system access unrelated to the skill's stated purpose of YouTube video summarization and analysis, posing significant security risks.
